actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Gary Woodland, Kevin Knox, and Jarrod Lyle are all struggling in the second round of the Masters.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: According to Honest John, headlamps and tyre tread depth were the most common faults on MOT records.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Kendal Mountain Festival, which took place from the 17-20 November, generated £2 million in visitor spend in and around the town.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Watford have announced that midfielder Ben Watson has left the club by mutual consent.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A memorial service for Manchester bombing victim Martyn Hett will be held on Wednesday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A company that wanted to turn a building in the center of Dolgellau into a hostel for up to 56 visitors has had its application turned down.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Sung Hyun Park is in the lead at the Houston Open with a score of 17 under.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Christopher Davies, 28, of Town Lane, Higher Bebington, has pleaded not guilty to the manslaughter of Barry O'Reilly, 37, after an incident at Claremont Farm on Clatterbridge Old Road in Spital, Wirral.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Scottish Premiership match between Hearts and Partick Thistle has been postponed due to bad weather.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Music mogul Simon Cowell was the victim of a burglary at his home in Holland Park.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: at his home in Holland Park.
